All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

I

id - Variable in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.Message
The id of the message.
IncorrectUserActionException - Exception Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.exceptions
the IncorrectUserActionException is a class that represents an Exception in case the controller can't execute a request of the player.
IncorrectUserActionException(String) - Constructor for exception class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.exceptions.IncorrectUserActionException
IncorrectUserActionException is a setter method of the exception, which gives the message to send and calls the method of the super class.
infoText - Variable in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.KingdomController
text to show information
INIT - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.MessageId
INITIALIZATION message type
initialize() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.ChooseTokenController
This method initializes the controller
initialize() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.CreateGameController
Initializes the controller.
initializeDeck(CardCreator) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.decks.Deck
The abstract method initializeDeck(cc) uses the object CardCreator to create the list of cards by reading them from a .json file specified in the subclass.
initializeDeck(CardCreator) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.decks.GoldDeck
The initializeDeck(cc) method implements the interface in the superclass.
initializeDeck(CardCreator) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.decks.ObjectiveDeck
The initializeDeck(cc) method implements the interface in the superclass.
initializeDeck(CardCreator) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.decks.ResourceDeck
The initializeDeck(cc) method implements the interface in the superclass.
initializeDeck(CardCreator) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.decks.StartDeck
The initializeDeck(cc) method implements the interface in the superclass.
initializeKingdom(ClientSidePlayer, StartCard, Side) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.clientmodel.ClientSideGameModel
Initializes the kingdom of the player.
InitMessage - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.initialization
This message is sent by the server to the client to initialize the game.
InitMessage(MessageId, List<Integer>, List<Integer>, int, List<Integer>, List<Integer>, List<Integer>, Resource, Resource) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.initialization.InitMessage
Constructor of the class.
INKWELL - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.game.Resource
The Inkwell object.
INKWELL - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.sides.Bonus
The Inkwell Bonus assigns a point for every inkwell object/resource currently present on the player's Kingdom.
INSECT - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.game.Resource
The Insect resource also can represent the colour purple of the card.
instantiateMyKingdom(StartCard, Side) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.player.Player
The instantiateMyKingdom(sC, startSide) method creates a new Kingdom for the Player with the StartCard and Side that are given as parameters.
isEmpty() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.decks.Deck
The isEmpty() method is used by non-package classes to know if the list of cards in the deck is empty either before or after accessing it.
isEndGameStarted() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.GameController
the isEndGameStarted method returns true if the game is in the final phase, or returns false otherwise.
isGameStarted() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.GameController
the isGameStarted method returns true if the game started, or returns false otherwise.
isPlacementConditionSatisfied(Hashtable<Resource, Integer>) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.sides.Front
The isPlacementConditionSatisfied() method verifies that the player has enough resources in the Kingdom to be able to place the GoldCard by confronting the amount of resources in the Hashtable myRes given as parameter and the Hashtable resourcePlacementCondition.
